sections.heading: Recommendations
sections.content:
- **pev-builder** (PEV Builder: staleness two-column v3): 7 redundant read(s) — pre-fetch cortex_source output into dispatch
- **pev-builder** (PEV Builder: staleness two-column v3): dispatch missing context bundle — orchestrator should inline pitch + cortex_source output
- **pev-builder** (PEV Builder: staleness two-column v3): only 32% of exploration uses cortex tools — prefer cortex_source/cortex_graph over Read/Grep to reduce context
